data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the 'Custom report builder'.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a 'Custom report builder', but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. While the linked use case mentions the need for a custom report builder, it lacks specific details or evidence to assert that this requirement is satisfied. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to the absence of necessary evidence.
gaps: No evidence of the implementation or functionality of the custom report builder.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for custom report builder functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete API calls and assertions that directly verify the existence and functionality of the custom report builder.
